title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for workplace behavior and the code of conduct?
A: Our company expects all employees to adhere to a high standard of conduct that promotes a respectful, inclusive, and productive work environment. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and stakeholders with respect, maintaining professionalism in all communications, and avoiding any form of harassment or discrimination. Employees are expected to comply with all company policies, including those related to attendance, punctuality, and dress code. Any behavior that undermines the integrity of the workplace, such as bullying or unethical practices, will not be tolerated. If you witness or experience any violations of this code, please report the incident to your supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours. For further guidance, refer to the Employee Handbook or contact HR directly at hr@company.com. Regular training sessions on workplace behavior will be held quarterly to reinforce these expectations.
